div.head: Memorandum by the Chief of the Division of Latin American Affairs (Duggan)
div.p: During a conversation this morning with the Bolivian Minister, I inquired whether he had ever received instructions to consult with the Department regarding cooperation between the two countries in matters pertaining to tin. The Minister replied that when the Minister of Finance passed through this country several months ago, the latter said that he would send instructions shortly after his return to La Paz. The Minister said he would write the Minister of Finance reminding him of this conversation.
